items.title: What we know after latest escalation in Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions
items.description: Bombings by Pakistan are the most significant development in tensions between the two neighbours - though the physical impact remains unclear.

items.title: Pakistan defence minister says country in 'open war' with Afghanistan after strikes
items.description: The latest attacks by Pakistan follow months of clashes between the two countries. despite agreeing to a fragile ceasefire in October.

items.title: Why Trump means the Cuban Revolution faces its biggest threat yet
items.description: Will a worsening internal crisis create the conditions for the Cuban Revolution to unravel from within?

items.title: Former US diplomat sentenced to life for abusing two girls in Burkina Faso
items.description: He used the girls' mother's life-threatening illness as an opportunity to demand sex, said the US Office of Public Affairs.

items.title: At least 55 Ghanaians killed in Russia-Ukraine war, minister says
items.description: This is the highest number of confirmed casualties from a single African country in the Ukraine-Russia war.
